attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.CALENDAR_CODE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.EXCEPTION_SET_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.CALENDAR_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.SEQ_NUM, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.NEXT_SEQ_NUM, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.PRIOR_SEQ_NUM, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.NEXT_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.PRIOR_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES,
 (
 select CALENDAR_CODE ,EXCEPTION_SET_ID ,CALENDAR_DATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES
 minus
 select CALENDAR_CODE ,EXCEPTION_SET_ID ,CALENDAR_DATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CALENDAR_CODE = STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.CALENDAR_CODE and  ACM.EXCEPTION_SET_ID = STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.EXCEPTION_SET_ID and ACM.CALENDAR_DATE = STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.CALENDAR_DATE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_BOM_CALENDAR_DATES.REFRESH_DATETIME
